title: Fix root Dockerfile EXPOSE 3000→1234
description: Root Dockerfile line 13 has EXPOSE 3000 but service defaults to port 1234 (bin/agentic-service.js). install/Dockerfile correctly uses EXPOSE 1234. docker-compose.yml correctly maps 1234:1234. Fix: Change EXPOSE 3000 to EXPOSE 1234 in root Dockerfile. This is a one-line fix.
